title: sterculia lanceolata var. coccinea
intro: Sterculia lanceolata var. coccinea is a variety of the Sterculia lanceolata plant, also known as the red sterculia or red crown flower, which is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Sterculia lanceolata var. coccinea include reducing fever, treating wounds and skin infections, and alleviating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
